title: Ventilation
description: Ventilation: Details of the means by which the building is ventilated.

ClosedFluesCount.description: The number of Closed Flues or chimneys in the Property.

BoilerFluesCount.description: The number of Boiler Flues or chimneys in the Property.

OtherFluesCount.description: The number of Other Flues or chimneys in the Property.

OpenChimneysCount.description: The number of Open Chimneys in the Property.

BlockedChimneysCount.description: The number of Blocked Chimneys in the Property.

OpenFluesCount.description: The number of Open Flues in the Property.

PSVCount.description: The number of passive stack vents.

FansVentCount.description: Do not use, for backwards compatibility only.

FluelessGasFiresCount.description: The number of flueless gas fires in the Property.

ShelteredSidesCount.description: The number of sheltered sides in the Property.

PressureTest.description: Whether there has been a pressure test, or whether an assumed value is used for the air permeability.

PressureTestCertificateNumber.description: Whether there has been a pressure test, or whether an assumed value is used for the air permeability.

AirPermeability.description: Air permeability; only if pressure test (yes or assumed).

HasDraughtLobby.description: Is there a draft lobby?  Only if no pressure test.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

DraughtStripping.description: Draughtstripping percentage; only if no pressure test.

MechanicalVentilationDataSource.description: Source of mechanical ventilation data; only if mechanical ventilation.

MechanicalVentSystemIndexNumber.description: Mechanical vent system index number; if mechanical vent data from database (MEV c, MEV dc, MV, MVHR).

MechanicalVentInstallationEngineer.description: Mechanical ventilation installation engineer registration reference.

MechanicalVentSystemMakeModel.description: Mechanical ventilation system make and model.

WetRoomsCount.description: Number of wet rooms, including the kitchen; if mech vent data from manufacturer declaration or database (MEV c, MV, MVHR).

MechanicalVentSpecificFanPower.description: MEV dc, specific fan power of fans in room, kitchen, in watts per (litres per second); if mechanical vent data from manufacturer declaration (MEV dc).

MechanicalVentHeatRecoveryEfficiency.description: Mechanical vent heat recovery efficiency percentage; if mechanical vent (MVHR).

MechanicalVentDuctType.description: Mechanical vent duct type; if MEV c, MV or MVHR.

MechanicalVentDuctInsulation.description: Mechanical vent duct insulation; if MVHR.

MechanicalVentDuctInsulationLevel.description: Mechanical vent duct insulation; if MVHR.

MechanicalVentDuctPlacement.description: Mechanical ventilation duct insulation; if MVHR.

MechanicalVentMeasuredInstallation.description: Mechanical ventilation SPF measured in situ; if MVHR or balanced.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

KitchenRoomFansCount.description: MEV dc, number of fans in room, kitchen; if mechanical vent data from database or manufacturer declaration (MEV dc).

KitchenRoomFansSpecificPower.description: MEV dc, specific fan power of fans in room, kitchen, in watts per (litres per second); if mechanical vent data from manufacturer declaration (MEV dc).

NonKitchenRoomFansCount.description: MEV dc, number of fans in room, rooms other than kitchen; if mechanical vent data from database or manufacturer declaration (MEV dc).

NonKitchenRoomFansSpecificPower.description: MEV dc, specific fan power of fans in room, rooms other than kitchen, in watts per (litres per second); if mechanical vent data from manufacturer declaration (MEV dc).

KitchenDuctFansCount.description: MEV dc, number of fans via duct, kitchen; if mechanical vent data from database or manufacturer declaration (MEV dc).

KitchenDuctFansSpecificPower.description: MEV dc, specific fan power of fans via duct, kitchen, in watts per (litres per second); if mechanical vent data from manufacturer declaration (MEV dc).

NonKitchenDuctFansCount.description: MEV dc, number of fans via duct, rooms other than kitchen; if mechanical vent data from database or manufacturer declaration (MEV dc).

NonKitchenDuctFansSpecificPower.description: MEV dc, specific fan power of fans via duct, rooms other than kitchen, in watts per (litres per second); if mechanical vent data from manufacturer declaration (MEV dc).

KitchenWallFansCount.description: MEV dc, number of fans through wall, kitchen; if mechanical vent data from database or manufacturer declaration (MEV dc).

KitchenWallFansSpecificPower.description: MEV dc, specific fan power of fans through wall, kitchen, in watts per (litres per second); if mechanical vent data from manufacturer declaration (MEV dc).

NonKitchenWallFansCount.description: MEV dc, number of fans through wall, rooms other than kitchen; if mechanical vent data from database or manufacturer declaration (MEV dc).

NonKitchenWallFansSpecificPower.description: MEV dc, specific fan power of fans through wall, rooms other than kitchen, in watts per (litres per second); if mechanical vent data from manufacturer declaration (MEV dc).

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

MechanicalVentDuctsIndexNumber.description: Mechanical vent ducts index number; if applicable.

GroundFloorType.description: The type of ground floor; only if no pressure test.

WallType.description: The construction of the walls; only if no pressure test.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
